query:
UPDATE platform_settings
SET
  adsEnabled = 1,
  adNetworkScripts = JSON_SET(
    adNetworkScripts,
    '$.between_mobile',
    '<script>\n  atOptions = {\n    ''key'' : ''7974ca0bcb4aeb169af6bf58cce85767'',\n    ''format'' : ''iframe'',\n    ''height'' : 100,\n    ''width'' : 320,\n    ''params'' : {}\n  };\n</script>\n<script src=\"https://www.highperformanceformat.com/7974ca0bcb4aeb169af6bf58cce85767/invoke.js\"></script>\n'
  )
WHERE id = 1;
